summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CleverBakes product categories feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly including category CRUD operations, product filtering, admin dashboard management, and product-category relationships.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/categories returns 4 seeded categories (Cakes, Cookies, Breads & Pastries, Brownies)
Backend API: POST /api/categories creates new category with auth
Backend API: PUT /api/categories/{id} updates category with auth
Backend API: DELETE /api/categories/{id} deletes category and unsets products with auth
Products have category_id field linking to categories
All 15 products assigned to their respective categories
Menu page category filter tabs display correctly (All, Cakes, Cookies, Breads & Pastries, Brownies)
Category filtering works correctly (All: 15 products, each category: 3 products)
Category badges appear on product cards
Admin dashboard Categories tab shows all categories with product counts
Admin can add new category via inline form
Admin can edit existing category via inline form
Admin can delete category (tested with cleanup)
Product modal has category dropdown with all categories
Product modal category dropdown populated from API
Products table shows category column with category badges
Admin login still works with admin/cleverbakes2025 credentials
Category product counts accurate (Cakes: 9, Cookies: 2, Breads & Pastries: 3, Brownies: 1)
Backend-frontend integration via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL working
Category structure validation (id, name, sort_order fields)
Product-category relationship validation

success_percentage.backend: 100% (27/27 tests passed including 6 new category tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components and category integrations working)
